name: Herb Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the softened butter until smooth.
2. Add the oregano, basil, and green onion tops to the butter.
3. Stir in the lemon juice until well combined.
4. Spoon the mixture into containers and garnish with your favorite herb.
5. Makes approximately 1 1/2 cups.
6. This herb butter is excellent spread on vegetables or served alongside homemade whole wheat bread.
